TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Yutak, title = Yutak, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yutak} }

S.FORM: Yutak Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ceynsusyang ka alang Yutak. 52 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 145 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 120 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 25 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 81%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Tnhangan alang Tnhangan alang : alang ciway Cin-ping. Pnseanak alang Thuyan alang : yahan tnais sngayan ka alang ciway Cin-ping. Nniqan Nniqan alang : Sin-cu-sey Ceyn-s-syang Cing-ping-cun. Llbangan Klbangan : ga hunac Tey-ta-na sdalih 3km hini, hay-pa o yabi 5,6 kbkuy dxgal Tay-wan. Nniqan llingay Llingay ti-ri : 500 dhuq 600m dxgal Tay-wan ka hay-pa. Pgkla ppanan rulu Pgkla ppana rulu : rmgriq rulu. Tduwa muda kndadax kwo-taw stabuy Cu-rin cyaw-ryo-taw, mlutuc sn-taw 120 musa mquri Ney-wan, hmrinas paru hakaw Ceyn-s do mlutuc elug Cu- 60 seyn, ga brah paru hakaw Cin-ping do mlutuc elug Cu 61 seyn dhuq alang ciway Cin-ping. Mlutuc Teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang. Skari kari Skari kari ; kari Taya. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Snhiyan cung-cyaw : Ci-tu-cyaw,Ten-cu-cyaw, fu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang : niqan tnkari saw "alang egu mudu lmiqu" ksun ka kari Tay-ya Ta-he, kndadax bukuy sklawa Tanahtunux siida ka seejiq nii hini, kndudul kndadax alang YU-fung klgan alang miyah thjing hini ka seejiq Kwan-cyun. Pgkla rgrigaw kwan-kwang Kklaan rgrigan : pusu tatac.Pyasan tgciway (03)5841633. Sin-cu-sey ceyn-s-syang Cin-ping-cun maxal rin 68sbgan. qhjing ciway Cin-ping. ssaan rgrigan.hakaw Cin-ping. Kana knrbagan hakaw o 120m, 12m ka knlaban, malu sdowriq bi qtaan ka hakaw, snalu kingal saw mdka mquru xiluy ka hakaw, ida thuyan bi ka qnabil, rsuhan o niqan 144 ka rnsuhan quri uuqun,plkusan,nniqan dnii ka gaya seejiq hini. Ida hini ka niqan bi endaan rudan sbiyaw seejiq Tay-ya. Hwang-cin-tung ni tglaq hwang-cin. Mlutuc sklawa Tanah-tunux siida, seejiq Tanah-tunux o Siyahan dha niqan king hagay ka alang hini, tduwa prana, kika asi kari bling, dhuq sayang yahan rmigaw miyah qmita sun saw "Ceyn-s fung-cin-hwa"2003, Sin-cu-sey Ceyn-s-syang kung-swo ka pnatas) Qtaan bnatas
S.PHON: jutak gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn ¶…ônsusjaŇč ka alaŇč jutak. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, bunun *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. tnńßaŇčan alaŇč tnńßaŇčan alaŇč : alaŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. pns…ôanak alaŇč tńßujan alaŇč : jańßan tnais sŇčajan ka alaŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. nniqan nniqan alaŇč : sin- ¶u-s…ô ¶…ôn-s-sjaŇč ¶iŇč-piŇč- ¶un. llbaŇčan klbaŇčan : ga ńßuna ¶ t…ô-ta-na sdalińß *km ńßini, ńßaj-pa o jabi *,* kbkuj dxgal taj-wan. nniqan lliŇčaj lliŇčaj ti-…ĺi : *** dńßuq ***m dxgal taj-wan ka ńßaj-pa. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu pgkla ppana …ĺulu : …ĺmg…ĺiq …ĺulu. tduwa muda kndadax kwo-taw stabuj ¶u-…ĺin ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw, mlutu ¶ sn-taw *** musa mqu…ĺi n…ô-wan, ńßm…ĺinas pa…ĺu ńßakaw ¶…ôn-s do mlutu ¶ …ôlug ¶u- ** s…ôn, ga b…ĺańß pa…ĺu ńßakaw ¶in-piŇč do mlutu ¶ …ôlug ¶u ** s…ôn dńßuq alaŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ; ka…ĺi taja. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw : ¶i-tu- ¶jaw,t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw, *u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč : niqan tnka…ĺi saw "alaŇč …ôgu mudu lmiqu" ksun ka ka…ĺi taj-ja ta-ńß…ô, kndadax bukuj sklawa tanańßtunux siida ka s…ô…ô…üiq nii ńßini, kndudul kndadax alaŇč ju-*uŇč klgan alaŇč mijańß tńß…üiŇč ńßini ka s…ô…ô…üiq kwan- ¶jun. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigaw kwan-kwaŇč kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan : pusu tata ¶.pjasan tg ¶iwaj (**)*******. sin- ¶u-s…ô ¶…ôn-s-sjaŇč ¶in-piŇč- ¶un maxal …ĺin **sbgan. qńß…üiŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. ssaan …ĺg…ĺigan.ńßakaw ¶in-piŇč. kana kn…ĺbagan ńßakaw o ***m, **m ka knlaban, malu sdow…ĺiq bi qtaan ka ńßakaw, snalu kiŇčal saw mdka mqu…ĺu xiluj ka ńßakaw, ida tńßujan bi ka qnabil, …ĺsuńßan o niqan *** ka …ĺnsuńßan qu…ĺi uuqun,plkusan,nniqan dnii ka gaja s…ô…ô…üiq ńßini. ida ńßini ka niqan bi …ôndaan …ĺudan sbijaw s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja. ńßwaŇč- ¶in-tuŇč ni tglaq ńßwaŇč- ¶in. mlutu ¶ sklawa tanańß-tunux siida, s…ô…ô…üiq tanańß-tunux o sijańßan dńßa niqan kiŇč ńßagaj ka alaŇč ńßini, tduwa p…ĺana, kika asi ka…ĺi bliŇč, dńßuq sajaŇč jańßan …ĺmigaw mijańß qmita sun saw " ¶…ôn-s *uŇč- ¶in-ńßwa"****, sin- ¶u-s…ô ¶…ôn-s-sjaŇč kuŇč-swo ka pnatas) qtaan bnatas
S.FORM: Yutak Gaga mniq Sincuseyn Ceynsusyang ka alang Yutak. 52 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 145 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 120 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 25 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Tayal 81%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Tnhangan alang Tnhangan alang : alang ciway Cin-ping. Pnseanak alang Thuyan alang : yahan tnais sngayan ka alang ciway Cin-ping. Nniqan Nniqan alang : Sin-cu-sey Ceyn-s-syang Cing-ping-cun. Llbangan Klbangan : ga hunac Tey-ta-na sdalih 3km hini, hay-pa o yabi 5,6 kbkuy dxgal Tay-wan. Nniqan llingay Llingay ti-ri : 500 dhuq 600m dxgal Tay-wan ka hay-pa. Pgkla ppanan rulu Pgkla ppana rulu : rmgriq rulu. Tduwa muda kndadax kwo-taw stabuy Cu-rin cyaw-ryo-taw, mlutuc sn-taw 120 musa mquri Ney-wan, hmrinas paru hakaw Ceyn-s do mlutuc elug Cu- 60 seyn, ga brah paru hakaw Cin-ping do mlutuc elug Cu 61 seyn dhuq alang ciway Cin-ping. Mlutuc Teyn-c ti-tu Teyn-c ti-tu alang. Klgan seejiq alang Klgan seejiq alang. Skari kari Skari kari ; kari Taya. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Snhiyan cung-cyaw : Ci-tu-cyaw,Ten-cu-cyaw, fu-cyaw. Pnyahan alang Pnyahan alang : niqan tnkari saw "alang egu mudu lmiqu" ksun ka kari Tay-ya Ta-he, kndadax bukuy sklawa Tanahtunux siida ka seejiq nii hini, kndudul kndadax alang YU-fung klgan alang miyah thjing hini ka seejiq Kwan-cyun. Pgkla rgrigaw kwan-kwang Kklaan rgrigan : pusu tatac.Pyasan tgciway (03)5841633. Sin-cu-sey ceyn-s-syang Cin-ping-cun maxal rin 68sbgan. qhjing ciway Cin-ping. ssaan rgrigan.hakaw Cin-ping. Kana knrbagan hakaw o 120m, 12m ka knlaban, malu sdowriq bi qtaan ka hakaw, snalu kingal saw mdka mquru xiluy ka hakaw, ida thuyan bi ka qnabil, rsuhan o niqan 144 ka rnsuhan quri uuqun,plkusan,nniqan dnii ka gaya seejiq hini. Ida hini ka niqan bi endaan rudan sbiyaw seejiq Tay-ya. Hwang-cin-tung ni tglaq hwang-cin. Mlutuc sklawa Tanah-tunux siida, seejiq Tanah-tunux o Siyahan dha niqan king hagay ka alang hini, tduwa prana, kika asi kari bling, dhuq sayang yahan rmigaw miyah qmita sun saw "Ceyn-s fung-cin-hwa"2003, Sin-cu-sey Ceyn-s-syang kung-swo ka pnatas) Qtaan bnatas
S.PHON: jutak gaga mniq sin ¶us…ôn ¶…ônsusjaŇč ka alaŇč jutak. ** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, tajal **%, bunun *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. tnńßaŇčan alaŇč tnńßaŇčan alaŇč : alaŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. pns…ôanak alaŇč tńßujan alaŇč : jańßan tnais sŇčajan ka alaŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. nniqan nniqan alaŇč : sin- ¶u-s…ô ¶…ôn-s-sjaŇč ¶iŇč-piŇč- ¶un. llbaŇčan klbaŇčan : ga ńßuna ¶ t…ô-ta-na sdalińß *km ńßini, ńßaj-pa o jabi *,* kbkuj dxgal taj-wan. nniqan lliŇčaj lliŇčaj ti-…ĺi : *** dńßuq ***m dxgal taj-wan ka ńßaj-pa. pgkla ppanan …ĺulu pgkla ppana …ĺulu : …ĺmg…ĺiq …ĺulu. tduwa muda kndadax kwo-taw stabuj ¶u-…ĺin ¶jaw-…ĺjo-taw, mlutu ¶ sn-taw *** musa mqu…ĺi n…ô-wan, ńßm…ĺinas pa…ĺu ńßakaw ¶…ôn-s do mlutu ¶ …ôlug ¶u- ** s…ôn, ga b…ĺańß pa…ĺu ńßakaw ¶in-piŇč do mlutu ¶ …ôlug ¶u ** s…ôn dńßuq alaŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. mlutu ¶ t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu t…ôn- ¶ ti-tu alaŇč. klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč klgan s…ô…ô…üiq alaŇč. ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ska…ĺi ka…ĺi ; ka…ĺi taja. snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw snńßijan ¶uŇč- ¶jaw : ¶i-tu- ¶jaw,t…ôn- ¶u- ¶jaw, *u- ¶jaw. pnjańßan alaŇč pnjańßan alaŇč : niqan tnka…ĺi saw "alaŇč …ôgu mudu lmiqu" ksun ka ka…ĺi taj-ja ta-ńß…ô, kndadax bukuj sklawa tanańßtunux siida ka s…ô…ô…üiq nii ńßini, kndudul kndadax alaŇč ju-*uŇč klgan alaŇč mijańß tńß…üiŇč ńßini ka s…ô…ô…üiq kwan- ¶jun. pgkla …ĺg…ĺigaw kwan-kwaŇč kklaan …ĺg…ĺigan : pusu tata ¶.pjasan tg ¶iwaj (**)*******. sin- ¶u-s…ô ¶…ôn-s-sjaŇč ¶in-piŇč- ¶un maxal …ĺin **sbgan. qńß…üiŇč ¶iwaj ¶in-piŇč. ssaan …ĺg…ĺigan.ńßakaw ¶in-piŇč. kana kn…ĺbagan ńßakaw o ***m, **m ka knlaban, malu sdow…ĺiq bi qtaan ka ńßakaw, snalu kiŇčal saw mdka mqu…ĺu xiluj ka ńßakaw, ida tńßujan bi ka qnabil, …ĺsuńßan o niqan *** ka …ĺnsuńßan qu…ĺi uuqun,plkusan,nniqan dnii ka gaja s…ô…ô…üiq ńßini. ida ńßini ka niqan bi …ôndaan …ĺudan sbijaw s…ô…ô…üiq taj-ja. ńßwaŇč- ¶in-tuŇč ni tglaq ńßwaŇč- ¶in. mlutu ¶ sklawa tanańß-tunux siida, s…ô…ô…üiq tanańß-tunux o sijańßan dńßa niqan kiŇč ńßagaj ka alaŇč ńßini, tduwa p…ĺana, kika asi ka…ĺi bliŇč, dńßuq sajaŇč jańßan …ĺmigaw mijańß qmita sun saw " ¶…ôn-s *uŇč- ¶in-ńßwa"****, sin- ¶u-s…ô ¶…ôn-s-sjaŇč kuŇč-swo ka pnatas) qtaan bnatas
